allow: Bash(./gradlew assembleDebug && adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell am start -n com.neko.music/.MainActivity)
Bash(echo $ANDROID_HOME && ls /opt/android* 2>/dev/null || ls ~/Android* 2>/dev/null || ls /usr/lib/android* 2>/dev/null || find /opt -name "android-sdk*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
